IOU Sustainability and Innovation Center – TÜBİSAD Collaboration

As the
Sustainability and Innovation Center, we will design recycling processes by
creating our electronic waste management procedure on our campus with TÜBİSAD
Informatics Industrialists Association. With

TÜBİSAD
Informatics Industrialists' Association

as the AEEE, Authorized
Institution, we aim to raise awareness on electrical and electronic wastes as
well as contribute to sustainability by recycling these wastes.
